title: neottia polystachya
intro: Neottia polystachya, also known as the Eastern twayblade, is a rare and endangered orchid native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Neottia polystachya include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Neottia polystachya can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although its availability is limited due to its rarity and protected status.
